feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.task_description: Make install.js automatically download and install the coderlm binary to ~/.claude/nf-bin/coderlm when it is missing
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.approach: Integrate coderlm-lifecycle.ensureBinary() into the install() function's bin installation step to automatically download the coderlm binary from GitHub Releases to ~/.claude/nf-bin/coderlm when missing, ensuring users get coderlm without any manual steps.
out_of_scope: Modifying the coderlm binary's GitHub release process or asset naming conventions
Updating platform support beyond current coderlm-lifecycle.cjs detection
Adding command-line flags to skip or customize coderlm binary installation
Implementing automatic updates or version pinning for the coderlm binary
Adding user prompts or interactive options for coderlm installation
feature/issue-58-integrate-coderlm-adapt.risk_reason: Task requires changes to bin/install.js (installer file), which is a GUARDRAIL trigger for high risk.
